results.title: Alison Steadman reads ‘Recuerdo’ in memory of her parents and two ‘lovely’ sisters
results.description: Alison Steadman reads “Recuerdo” by Edna St Vincent Millay in remembrance of both her parents and her two “lovely” sisters. “It’s very sad but I comfort myself in the memory that I had such kindness given to me,” Steadman says. The short film, directed by Oliver Parker and shot at Dr Johnson’s House in London, is part of a series to commemorate Celebration Day – a nationwide movement that encourages Brits to take a moment and remember those we have lost who have shaped our lives. Curated by Allie Esiri, the films will be published exclusively on The Independent in the lead-up to Celebration Day on Monday 25 May.

results.title: SPNI elevates Rupen Thakkar as VP & head counsel
results.description: Sony Pictures Networks India has elevated Rupen Thakkar as vice president and head counsel - networks (television and Sony Sports Network), StudioNext and corporate. Thakkar announced the development in a LinkedIn post, where he said: “I am thrilled to step into my new role as Vice President and Head Counsel - Networks (Television and Sony Sports Network), StudioNext and Corporate at Sony Pictures Networks India! Excited to start this next chapter, drive new initiatives, and continue working with an incredible team.” He has been with Sony Pictures Networks India for over three years, holding multiple legal leadership roles across network channels production, StudioNext, sports television and corporate legal functions. Prior to the elevation, he served as senior lead counsel - sports television and corporate. Before joining Sony Pictures Networks India, Thakkar was AVP legal at Unacademy . He has also worked with Zee Entertainment Enterprises Limited as AVP legal - television and Zee5, and held leadership positions at IndiaCast Media , Sahara India , Nimbus Communications and Overseas Infrastructure Alliance (India).

results.title: Ripoll: the capital where the far-right has ceased to be taboo
results.description: On June 17, 2023, the political reality of Ripoll changed completely. Silvia Orriols, under the banner of Aliança Catalana, became the first far-right pro-independence mayor in Catalonia , after Junts, ERC, the PSC, and the CUP failed to agree on forming an alternative government. The town of Ripoll, with about 11,000 inhabitants, deeply marked by the trauma of the 2017 Rambla attacks, became a key point in Catalan political geography and had a direct impact on the decisions of the national leaderships of the parties. The latest media case: that of the two socialist councilors who were sidelined amid reproaches for voting in favor of Orriols' budgets.

results.title: Trump & Bibi Embarrassed; 'Iran Won This Round, Emerged Stronger' Bombshell By Ex-Israeli Officer
results.description: A stunning claim by former senior Israeli official Giora Eiland is making headlines after he declared that “Iran won the war” against the US-Israel alliance. Eiland, a retired Israeli major general and former head of Israel’s National Security Council, told Channel 12 that Tehran emerged stronger from the latest conflict, while Washington and Tel Aviv now face a difficult strategic reality. According to Press TV, Eiland said Iran’s leadership survived the aggression intact and demonstrated resilience and power throughout the confrontation. He further claimed that the United States is now “in an evident bind,” while Israel faces “an even greater predicament.” The explosive remarks are being seen as a major embarrassment for Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and US President Donald Trump, especially amid ongoing tensions over Iran’s nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz crisis
